# Check current state after game over
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current objects after game over:")
for node in seg:
    b = node['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if node['color'] not in ['O', 'w']:
        print(f"  {node['color']}: row=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}], col=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}], pixels={node['pixels']}")

# Check if level reset
print(f"\nLevel: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Step: {current_frame.step}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
